input_text: ABC Capital is a Singapore-based family office with strong EM appetite and a $5-10M ticket size preference for Asia-focused venture funds.
GIC is a global investment firm set up by the Government of Singapore to invest Singapore's foreign reserves.
The LP indicated timing is not right — fully deployed for this cycle, expects to look at next vintage.
Their investment policy restricts EM exposure to below 5% of total portfolio — committee approval required for exceptions.
XYZ Pension Fund, based in Tokyo, manages retirement assets for Japanese civil servants. Focus on domestic bonds and DM equity.
Introduced by alumni network — warm intro from former Harvard Endowment colleague.
Fund of Funds manager based in London, running $2.5B across 40+ PE managers globally. Co-investment rights are mandatory.
